title: helichrysum pulchellum
intro: Helichrysum pulchellum, also known as the yellow buttons or small yellow everlasting, is a small, flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of helichrysum pulchellum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Helichrysum pulchellum is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
